channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇸🇦🇦🇪🇮🇷 Saudi Arabia and UAE Carried Out Secret Attacks Inside Iran
item.description: US officials reveal that Gulf Arab states conducted clandestine operations against Iranian targets, seeking to deter Iran after the war exposed the limits of American security guarantees.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸🇹🇼 Xi Warns Trump on Taiwan at High-Stakes Beijing Summit
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping cautioned that mishandling Taiwan could push the two superpowers toward conflict, as Trump and Xi met for a two-day summit focused on trade, the Iran war, and strategic competition.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 China's Xi Hails "New Positioning" in Ties With US
item.description: President Xi Jinping proclaimed a recalibrated US-China relationship envisioning cooperation with measured competition, following talks with President Trump in Beijing.

item.title: 🇱🇧🇮🇱 Lebanon to Press Israel for Cease-Fire at Washington Talks
item.description: A senior Lebanese official said Beirut will demand Israel cease fire at face-to-face talks that began Thursday, as Iran-backed Hezbollah and Israel continue to trade blows despite a US-backed truce.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇴🇲 India Condemns Attack That Sank Indian-Flagged Ship Off Oman
item.description: New Delhi called an attack that sank an Indian cargo vessel in Omani waters "unacceptable" after the ship was hit by a suspected drone or missile strike amid escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Drone Wounds Three Civilians in Northern Israel
item.description: A Hezbollah drone exploded inside Israel on Thursday, injuring three civilians, two of them severely, according to Israeli military and hospitals. The incident occurred ahead of a third round of direct talks.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇨🇳 Iran Allows Chinese Vessels to Transit Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran has begun allowing some Chinese vessels to transit through the Strait of Hormuz following an understanding over Iranian management protocols for the waterway, the semi-official Fars news agency reported Thursday.

item.title: 🌍 How the Iran War Has Reshaped the Middle East
item.description: The war that began on February 28 with a massive Israeli-U.S. bombing campaign against Iran has rocked the entire Middle East, wreaking damage to infrastructure and economies and overturning settled assumptions about regional security.

item.title: 🇨🇳💰 Chinese Yuan Hits 3-Year High as Markets Await Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: China's yuan edged up to a three-year high against the dollar on Thursday, while key stock indexes retreated from recent peaks amid profit-taking, as investors awaited further news from a summit between the leaders of the world's two largest economies.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳🇮🇷 Rubio Says US Wants China to Press Iran to Change Course in Gulf
item.description: The United States hopes to convince China to play a more active role in trying to persuade Iran to walk away from what it is doing in the Gulf, U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said in an interview aired on Fox News on Wednesday.

item.title: 🇮🇶 Iraq seeks IMF financial assistance due to Iran war economic impact
item.description: Iraqi officials have approached the International Monetary Fund for financial assistance as the Iran war creates economic pressures on the country, highlighting regional spillover effects.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Health Secretary Wes Streeting resigns amid growing pressure on PM
item.description: British Health Secretary Wes Streeting resigned on Thursday as pressure mounts on the UK prime minister, marking significant political turmoil in British politics.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkish central bank raises inflation target, warns of Iran war risks
item.description: Turkey's central bank increased its year-end inflation forecast and warned of potential economic impacts from the ongoing Iran conflict affecting regional stability.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia's prison population drops 180,000 as prisoners join Ukraine war
item.description: Russia has seen its prison population fall by 180,000 over four years as prisoners are offered army contracts to fight in Ukraine in exchange for sentence reductions.

item.title: 🇱🇻 Latvian Armed Forces deploy Natrix unmanned ground vehicles
item.description: The Latvian Armed Forces have begun operating the Natrix NXU unmanned ground vehicle as of May 2026, continuing NATO eastern flank defense modernization.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump and Xi Agree Strait of Hormuz Must Remain Open
item.description: President Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping met in Beijing and agreed that the Strait of Hormuz must remain open for energy shipments, while Xi warned that Taiwan differences could lead to conflict. The summit addressed Iran war impacts on global oil flows.

item.title: ⚖️ Zelenskiy ex-chief of staff arrested in widening Ukraine corruption probe
item.description: Ukrainian President Zelenskiy's former right-hand man was taken into custody on money-laundering charges, part of a fight against graft that is fuelling wartime political tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia unleashes largest wartime aerial assault with 1,500+ drones over two days
item.description: Russia carried out its largest aerial attack over a two-day period since the war began, pounding Kyiv and other cities with hundreds of drones. Ukrainian officials reported widespread destruction and casualties.

item.title: 🚢 New ship attacks near Strait of Hormuz as Trump-Xi summit stalls on Iran
item.description: New attacks on vessels near the Strait of Hormuz brought a reminder of the costs of a prolonged stalemate, with peace talks stalled and President Trump in Beijing discussing Iran with Xi.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Putin to visit China soon as Russia deepens ties amid Iran war
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin will visit China very soon, the Kremlin said, as preparations for the trip are already complete amid ongoing global tensions over the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Europe Fears Putin May Exploit US Distraction in Middle East
item.description: NATO officials express concern that Russia sees a window of opportunity while US attention is focused on the Iran conflict, potentially testing alliance resolve in Eastern Europe.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Belgian Defense Minister Praises Turkish Defense Industry
item.description: Belgium defense chief calls Turkiye a model to follow in defense production, highlighting the growing prominence of Turkish defense exports and technology in European security discussions.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC Slashes 2026 Global Oil Demand Growth Forecast
item.description: The cartel lowered its demand growth projections as the Iran war creates uncertainty in energy markets, signaling potential production adjustments ahead.

item.title: 🇮🇳🛢️ India Seeks Russian Oil Waiver Extension from US
item.description: India has asked the US to extend its waiver on Russian oil imports as the Iran war disrupts Persian Gulf energy supplies, Bloomberg News reported.

item.title: 🇮🇳💰 India Considers Tax Cuts on Foreign Bond Investments
item.description: India is considering significant reductions in taxes paid by foreign investors on bonds as authorities seek to align policies with global norms and attract inflows.
